title: QA Analyst
description: Snowflake is hiring a QA Analyst to ensure the quality of our cloud data platform. You'll design test strategies, execute comprehensive test plans, and collaborate with engineering teams to deliver reliable software. Working onsite in San Diego, you'll be part of a team passionate about quality and innovation.
responsibilities: Design and execute test plans covering functional, performance, and integration testing
Create test cases and automated test scripts using Python or Java
Execute regression testing and identify defects; track and report issues
Collaborate with product and engineering teams on quality requirements
Monitor test coverage and quality metrics; recommend improvements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
skills: Test automation using Python, Java, or similar languages
Familiarity with testing frameworks and CI/CD tools

benefits: Comprehensive health, vision, and dental coverage
